components.buttons: rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors
components.tabs: flex gap-8 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2. Active tab has border-b-2 border-[#FF5A00] text-white. Inactive is text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300.
components.inputs: bg-[#1C1C21] border border-zinc-800 rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF5A00] focus:border-[#FF5A00] text-white p-3
components.calendar: Custom grid layout, full width, using status colors for events. Edge-to-edge styling, minimal borders.
components.data_display: Dense tabular layout with monospace numbers for budgets/cachets.

hero_background.description: Warm stage lights in dark venue

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 2-page app layout: Dashboard (with Tabs) and separate Calendar route.
Use ONLY JavaScript (.js/.jsx) files. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx).
Dashboard Tabs should include: Artistes, Lieux, Événements, Résidences.
Add font imports to the main CSS/HTML for Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Apply global styling for a Dark theme by default on the body (`bg-[#0A0A0C] text-white`).
Numbers, currencies (cachets), and dates must use JetBrains Mono font.
Do NOT use standard rounded cards. Use `rounded-none`, thin `border-zinc-800` borders, and flat backgrounds (`bg-[#121215]`) for all containers to enforce the brutalist/editorial aesthetic.
Calendar should highlight different event types using the status colors provided (Orange for concert, Yellow for spectacle, Blue for residence).
Include placeholder dummy data populated with the provided image URLs.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and interactive elements have valid `data-testid` attributes.
Implement an upload UI area using a dashed border (`border-dashed border-zinc-700 hover:border-[#FF5A00]`) for PDFs/Images.
The entire application text and labels must be in French.
